title: Applications of Quantum Boltzmann Machines
description: Explore real-world applications of quantum Boltzmann machines including generative modeling, optimization, quantum chemistry, and machine learning tasks.
learningObjectives: Apply QBMs to generative modeling tasks
Use QBMs for quantum chemistry simulations
Build QBM classifiers and feature extractors
Combine QBMs with deep learning architectures
Evaluate QBM performance on benchmark tasks
